steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the location of the Isthmus of Panama. One note states it directly: “The Isthmus of Panama is located in Central America.” We need the choice that actually states where it is.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘One example of an isthmus is the Isthmus of Panama’: Names the isthmus but gives no location. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘The Isthmus of Panama is located in Central America, where it connects North America to South America’: Directly states “located in Central America” — exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘An isthmus, also known as a land bridge, is a strip of land that connects two larger pieces of land across an expanse of water’: Defines an isthmus in general; never mentions the Isthmus of Panama or its location. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘An isthmus, or land bridge, like the Isthmus of Panama, connects two larger pieces of land’: Describes what an isthmus does; does not specify where the Isthmus of Panama is. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
